assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktrees removes directories not in preserveTaskIds
assertionResults.title: removes directories not in preserveTaskIds

assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktrees preserves all when preserveTaskIds contains all task IDs
assertionResults.title: preserves all when preserveTaskIds contains all task IDs

assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktrees removes all when preserveTaskIds is empty set
assertionResults.title: removes all when preserveTaskIds is empty set

assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktrees does nothing when preserveTaskIds is undefined (no dir removal)
assertionResults.title: does nothing when preserveTaskIds is undefined (no dir removal)

assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktrees returns gitPruneRan=false when gitPrune is false
assertionResults.title: returns gitPruneRan=false when gitPrune is false
